{{CargoRelic
|name=Kilogram Prototype
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=01-09
|source=Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (1.1%), Fungus Chest (2%)
|description=On Jan 9, 1889, the first world-recognized standard weight system was created.

The standard measurement system was invented on this day which is regarded as an important standardization process of mankind. Composed of platinum and iridium, it has a high density and corrosion resistance. As the technology kept improving, it had been under constant recast until it was no longer used to measure kg.
|fame=32
|art=29
|fth=21
|civ=28
|tech=44
|ss1=Per 200 DNA Strength, Snail DEF +3<br>DNA Strength: 800/800
|ss2=Per 200 DNA Strength, Snail DEF +3<br>DNA Strength: 1,600/1,600
|ss3=Per 200 DNA Strength, Snail DEF +3<br>DNA Strength: 2,400/2,400
|ss4=Per 200 DNA Strength, Snail DEF +3<br>DNA Strength: 4,000/4,000
|ss7=Per 200 DNA Strength, Snail DEF +3<br>DNA Strength: 4,000/4,000<br>Snail DEF +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Hellas skill I.png|50px]] Place in Hellenic Museum: This Relic's TECH +5
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Blue TECH Relics]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:DNA Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Museum Boost]]
[[Category:TECH Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Output Boost]]
[[Category:Reagent Crafting Boost]]
